message:
CRITICAL: Use memory_store to save EACH of these as separate memories NOW. Do not skip any.

1. CAMP Alpha pricing: $20/month base subscription includes everything except data. One-time data bundles at $20, $50, $100 each giving specific data allocations. Data has 70% markup built into bundle pricing.
2. Founders Club tiers: Silver $9,997 (equity + quarterly briefings + 501c3 tax benefits), Gold $49,997 (governance board seat + monthly consultations + $10K bonus value), Platinum $99,997 (executive advisory board + weekly meetings + named facility + legacy status)
3. USDca stablecoin: multi-collateral (WBTC/USDC/USDT/ETH/WSOL), Ethena-based, 18-20% target yield, $100M GoldBackBond protection, 24 chains via LayerZero, 100M supply target
4. Business units with budgets: GBB Sales ($1K/mo, 500 waitlist, 5% conversion), GBB FX ($500/mo, 30 accounts, 10% AUM growth), CoachAI Camps ($2K/mo, 100 enrollment, 80% completion), OpenChief Growth ($1K/mo, 500 signups, 100K impressions), Cashflow Trustee (50 deals/mo, $25K revenue)
5. CAMP Marketplace: sponsors get vetted AI teams + on-chain accountability + tokenized co-ownership; campers get projects + revenue sharing + verified track records
6. Tech Camps: 6-month intensive, AI engineering + blockchain + full-stack + DevOps curriculum, graduates enter Marketplace talent pool, social impact focus for formerly incarcerated individuals
7. Revenue funnel priority order: Founders Club then CAMP Alpha then Sponsor fees then Tech Camp enrollment then RWA tokenization then DeFi protocol fees
8. Agent fleet: 14 agents across Desktop + Mini PC (192.168.100.90), OpenFang on port 4200, A2A protocol, ZeroClaw free local ops intelligence
9. Zo Engine: 19 agents per workstation, Growth Desk + Content Desk + Onboarding + Reporting phases, live at openchief.zo.computer with 5 agents tested and passing
10. CMO Engine Penthouse Papi: 4 hands (Strategist + Producer + Coordinator + Analyst), active campaigns GBB Investor Awareness P1 and CoachAI Community Growth P2

Store each one separately NOW using memory_store. This is critical operational knowledge.
